creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
While waiting for your feedback, I tried a few different OPTIONS and
noticed that the packing list was incomplete when mailutils is built
--with-python.  This revision of the shar addresses that issue and I
have also simplified the Makefile.

The more I review this port, the more I see opportunities for
improvement, so you might see a few more follow-ups from me by the time
this PR regains your attention! :)

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
